title: When reinvestment fails: A look at the tax implications of unused Capital Gains Account Scheme funds
summary: Section 54F is a tax-saving provision designed to encourage residential housing investments by exempting LTCG on non-residential assets, capped at a maximum investment threshold of ₹10 crore.

title: Unclaimed Financial Assets: How to check and claim your forgotten money from banks, mutual funds, insurance and NPS

title: P/E vs PEG ratio: Which metric offers deeper insight into a company's growth potential and valuation?
summary: The price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio is one of the most common metrics for valuing a stock. By incorporating earnings growth, the PEG ratio provides a more comprehensive view of whether a stock is fairly valued relative to its earnings growth.

title: Satin Creditcare promoters to infuse Rs 100 crore, raise stake
